response_constraints: Retrieve the existing summary before issuing the dependent summary update.
Confirm the change only after memory_update_summary succeeds, without claiming unrelated memories changed.

stages.purpose: Read the current recursive summary so its unrelated facts can be preserved.

arguments.summary: Relocation plan: movers booked for April 9. Utilities transfer on April 8. Key pickup is April 7 at 3 p.m.

stages.purpose: Write the revised full summary after incorporating the retrieved content and the user's single requested change.

state_assertions: summary == "Relocation plan: movers booked for April 9. Utilities transfer on April 8. Key pickup is April 7 at 3 p.m."

prompt: Read the relocation summary and replace the unconfirmed key pickup with April 7 at 3 p.m. Preserve both other dates.

tool_results.summary: Relocation plan: movers booked for April 9. Utilities transfer on April 8. Key pickup is unconfirmed.
